message.content:
{
  "page_type": "wiring_diagram",
  "summary": "This page shows a wiring diagram for connecting multiple I/O boards and multiple hand controllers in an HVAC system. It illustrates the physical connections between I/O boards (labeled 1, 2, and 16) and hand controllers (labeled 1 and 4) using colored wires (red, yellow, green, black). The diagram includes terminal blocks and notes on address settings and wiring practices.",
  "visual_entities": [
    {"type": "component", "label": "I/O board (1)"},
    {"type": "component", "label": "I/O board (2)"},
    {"type": "component", "label": "I/O board (16)"},
    {"type": "component", "label": "Hand controller (1)"},
    {"type": "component", "label": "Hand controller (4)"},
    {"type": "terminal_block", "label": "Switch input terminal block"},
    {"type": "terminal_block", "label": "Analog input terminal block"},
    {"type": "wire", "label": "Red wire"},
    {"type": "wire", "label": "Yellow wire"},
    {"type": "wire", "label": "Green wire"},
    {"type": "wire", "label": "Black wire"},
    {"type": "text_block", "label": "Notes section"}
  ],
  "visual_relationships": [
    {"from": "I/O board (1)", "relation": "connected to", "to": "Hand controller (1)"},
    {"from": "I/O board (2)", "relation": "connected to", "to": "Hand controller (4)"},
    {"from": "I/O board (1)", "relation": "has terminal block", "to": "Switch input terminal block"},
    {"from": "I/O board (1)", "relation": "has terminal block", "to": "Analog input terminal block"},
    {"from": "Red wire", "relation": "connects", "to": "I/O board (1) and Hand controller (1)"},
    {"from": "Yellow wire", "relation": "connects", "to": "I/O board (1) and Hand controller (1)"},
    {"from": "Green wire", "relation": "connects", "to": "I/O board (1) and Hand controller (1)"},
    {"from": "Black wire", "relation": "connects", "to": "I/O board (1) and Hand controller (1)"}
  ],
  "useful_for_knowledge_types": ["wiring_configuration", "component_connection", "system_integration", "troubleshooting"],
  "ocr_text_if_useful": "（三）多模块及多手操器方式连接示意图:\n说明:\n1、若您配置多块I/O板时，请参考I/O板地址设定表，依次设置各块板的地址，并按如图所示将通讯线依次级连。\n2、同理若需多个集中控制器，则也要设置地址，并按如图所示将电源及通讯线依次级连。\n3、通讯线之间建议用屏蔽双绞线。",
  "uncertainty_notes": "The exact function of each wire color (red, yellow, green, black) is not explicitly labeled in the diagram, so their specific signals (e.g., power, data) are inferred from typical wiring conventions. The relationship between I/O board (16) and hand controllers is not directly shown, as it appears to be part of a daisy-chain but the connection to a specific hand controller is not visually explicit.",
  "confidence": 0.85
}

parsed.summary: This page shows a wiring diagram for connecting multiple I/O boards and multiple hand controllers in an HVAC system. It illustrates the physical connections between I/O boards (labeled 1, 2, and 16) and hand controllers (labeled 1 and 4) using colored wires (red, yellow, green, black). The diagram includes terminal blocks and notes on address settings and wiring practices.
parsed.ocr_text_if_useful:
（三）多模块及多手操器方式连接示意图:
说明:
1、若您配置多块I/O板时，请参考I/O板地址设定表，依次设置各块板的地址，并按如图所示将通讯线依次级连。
2、同理若需多个集中控制器，则也要设置地址，并按如图所示将电源及通讯线依次级连。
3、通讯线之间建议用屏蔽双绞线。
parsed.uncertainty_notes: The exact function of each wire color (red, yellow, green, black) is not explicitly labeled in the diagram, so their specific signals (e.g., power, data) are inferred from typical wiring conventions. The relationship between I/O board (16) and hand controllers is not directly shown, as it appears to be part of a daisy-chain but the connection to a specific hand controller is not visually explicit.
